findings.evidence: `rg -n "change " code/TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing/Weight.lean` hits line 174; the same file defines `characteristicWeightNumerator_canonical_single` at line 155, which provides the reusable fact needed here.
findings.fix: Rewrite the proof through `characteristicWeight_def` and `characteristicWeightNumerator_canonical_single`, e.g. `rw [characteristicWeight_def, characteristicWeightNumerator_canonical_single]; norm_num`, or add a comment explaining why `change` is unavoidable.
findings.issue: `characteristicWeight_canonical_single` uses an undocumented `change` after `rw [characteristicWeight_single]`, relying on the exact normalized shape of the rewritten goal instead of the named numerator fact.

summary: One public proof relies on an undocumented `change`, which the proof-quality rubric requires replacing or justifying.
